message:
Fix code review findings: wire profile timeout, fix subagent lock discipline

- Wire DefaultCommandTimeoutMS() from provider profile into session config
  so Anthropic sessions get 120s instead of the generic 10s default
- Read a.sess.turns under a.sess.mu lock in subagent.run() to maintain
  consistent locking discipline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -172,11 +172,15 @@ func (a *subagent) run(ctx context.Context, input string) {
 
 	res, err := a.sess.ProcessInput(ctx, input)
 
+	a.sess.mu.Lock()
+	turns := a.sess.turns
+	a.sess.mu.Unlock()
+
 	a.mu.Lock()
 	a.result = res
 	a.err = err
 	a.running = false
-	a.turnsUsed = a.sess.turns
+	a.turnsUsed = turns
 	if err != nil {
 		a.status = SubAgentFailed
 	} else {
